case_title: DANIEL NG VS. MARTIN LEE ENG

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN OPPOSITION OF MARTIN ENG'S POSTPONEMENT REQUEST. DECLARATION RECEIVED BY FAX. FILED BY PLAINTIFF NG, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT ENG, MARTIN LEE

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR REASSIGNMENT OF SMALL CLAIM HEARING AFTER DEFENDANT MARTIN ENG'S CCP 170.6 PEREMPTORY CHALLENGE AS TO COMMISSIONER SLAVIT IS ACCEPTED. SHORT CAUSE TRIAL SET FOR DEC-03-2008 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING IS REASSIGNED TO SHORT CAUSE TRIAL ON DEC-03-2008 AT 9:30 AM IN 503, JUDGE ALVARADO. DEFENDANT MARTIN ENG'S CCP 170.6 PEREMPTORY CHALLENGE AS TO COMMISSIONER SLAVIT IS ACCEPTED BY THE COURT ON 12/3/08. (206)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NG, DANIEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ENG, MARTIN LEE $5,770.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,770.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-03-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR. MATTER REASSIGNED TO DEPT. 206. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
